name: joai-asset
description: Connect Asset to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Asset to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
interface.longDescription: The Asset app provides tools and operations for seamless transfer of blockchain assets, including cryptocurrencies and tokens, between different accounts and chains.
